chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يُجَامِعُ أَهْلَهُ فِي السَّفَرِ أَوْ يَقْدَمُ مِنْ سَفَرٍ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – The man who copulates with his wife during the journey, or he comes back from a journey during a Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/337)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/337)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَتَى أَهْلَهُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَ هُوَ مُسَافِرٌ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sahl, from his father who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about a man who went over to his wife during a Month of Ramazan, and he was a traveler. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl [from his father] who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who experiences sexual relation with his wife in the month of Ramadan during a journey. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful.’”
